channel.title: LLM Workflow on Shehao Li
channel.description: Recent content in LLM Workflow on Shehao Li

item.title: CalendarDIFF | AI Workflow Runtime for Gmail + ICS
item.description: AI workflow runtime and schedule-change governance system for Gmail + ICS, built around an explicit state-machine runtime, human review, chronological replay, and a deterministic prefilter -> LLM path.

item.title: About
item.description: Background, experience, and focus areas for Shehao Li in LLM workflows and backend engineering.
